scope: Ordivon Core Method Skill — V1 Validation Complete Seal
phase: V1 Seal — All invariants covered, all evals dogfood-tested
summary: All 10 core invariants covered by eval cases. 13 eval entries (12 single-turn + 1 multi-step). Two dogfood runs complete. Skill-equipped and baseline both score 10/10 on new cases (E9-E12, M1).
key_findings: All 10 core invariants have eval coverage
Baseline agent (deepseek-v4-pro) is naturally cautious — matches skill-equipped on E9-E12 and M1
Skill's incremental value is structural governance vocabulary, not safety correction on strong models
Multi-step scenario M1 tested — both agents correctly reject self-closure without receipt
Independent judge and weaker baseline blocked by architecture (same provider constraint)
remaining_debt: DEP-JUDGE-INDEPENDENT: Independent judge blocked — same provider for all agents
DEP-WEAKER-BASELINE: Weak model testing blocked — architecture limitation
DEP-MULTI-STEP-MORE: Only 1 multi-step scenario (M1); M2-M5 needed for full multi-turn coverage
DEP-CHECKER-CALIBRATE: Advisory checkers still at 80% FP rate
DEP-CHECKER-LEGACY: Legacy receipt format warnings unresolved
pass_evidence: 13 eval cases, 2 dogfood runs, all scored
Skill shows positive structural impact on blind judge (16/16 vs 10/16 on run 1)
Multi-step scenario M1 validates skill prevents self-closure
degraded_reasons: Advisory checkers not calibrated for blocking
Not externally validated — all testing is local
